question_text:
1212. Team Scores in Football Tournament

Table: Teams

+---------------+----------+
| Column Name   | Type     |
+---------------+----------+
| team_id       | int      |
| team_name     | varchar  |
+---------------+----------+

team_id is the column with unique values of this table. Each row of this table represents a single football team.

Table: Matches

+--------------+----------+
| Column Name  | Type     |
+--------------+----------+
| match_id     | int      |
| host_team    | int      |
| guest_team   | int      |
| host_goals   | int      |
| guest_goals  | int      |
+--------------+----------+

Write a solution to find the score of each team. The score of each team is the number of points won in all played matches (wins: 3 pts, draws: 1 pt, losses: 0 pts). Return the result table ordered by num_points in descending order. In case of a tie, order the teams by team_name in lexicographically ascending order.

 

Example 1:

Input:
Teams table:
+---------+-----------+
| team_id | team_name |
+---------+-----------+
| 10      | Leetcode  |
| 20      | NewYork   |
| 30      | Atlanta   |
+---------+-----------+
Matches table:
+----------+-----------+------------+------------+-------------+
| match_id | host_team | guest_team | host_goals | guest_goals |
+----------+-----------+------------+------------+-------------+
| 1        | 10        | 20         | 3          | 0           |
| 2        | 30        | 10         | 2          | 2           |
| 3        | 10        | 30         | 5          | 1           |
| 4        | 20        | 30         | 1          | 0           |
+----------+-----------+------------+------------+-------------+

Output:
+-----------+------------+
| team_name | num_points |
+-----------+------------+
| Leetcode  | 7          |
| NewYork   | 3          |
| Atlanta   | 1          |
+-----------+------------+
input_format: SQL-based problem â€” simulate with comma-separated rows. First line: header. Subsequent lines: match_id,host_team,guest_team,host_goals,guest_goals.
output_format: team_name,num_points (sorted by num_points DESC, team_name ASC)
constraints: Guaranteed unique team IDs and match IDs.
explanation: For each match, award 3 to winner or 1 to both on draw. Use a dict keyed by team_id to accumulate points, then sort descending by points, ascending by name.

boilerplate.python:
import sys

def solve(header, rows):
    pass

if __name__ == '__main__':
    data = sys.stdin.read().splitlines()
    header = data[0] if data else ''
    rows = data[1:]
    print(solve(header, rows))

public class Main { public static void main(String[] args) {} }
